item.description:
## What's Changed

- Keep Cloud recording details stable while revalidating cached data, so billing, job status, transcript state, and the inspector no longer blank out while switching recordings.
- Persist latest transcription job snapshots in the local Cloud cache and merge refreshed list rows with cached detail fields for a smoother SWR flow.
- Allow a completed recording to keep uploading/transcribing in the background after the processing panel is hidden, while returning the main panel to a ready-to-record state.
- Show a local notification when background processing finishes or fails.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `swift test` (67 tests)
- `CODESIGN_IDENTITY=- ./scripts/build-app.sh`
